title: David and Lisa
actors: Keir Dullea, Janet Margolin, Howard Da Silva
plot: Teenager David Clemens develops a hysterical fear that he will die if he comes into physical contact with another person. Perturbed, David's overbearing mother places him in a home for mentally disturbed young people.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 6 wins & 7 nominations total
